disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Reduced bowel motions over roughly 6 days, with only small, hard, pellet-like stools passed about 3 days ago after heavy straining
trigger_question_examples: When did you last open your bowels?
What have the stools been like?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's been nearly a week. The last time was about three days ago and it was just small hard pellets, and I had to really strain.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Straining with a sensation of incomplete evacuation and anorectal blockage; has used a finger near the back passage to assist defecation
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel you have fully emptied afterwards?
Have you ever had to help things along physically to go?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It always feels like there's still something stuck that won't come out, and yes — sometimes I've had to press near the back passage with my finger to get things moving.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: That's a bit embarrassing to talk about, to be honest.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Colicky lower-abdominal bloating and cramping that transiently eases with passing flatus
trigger_question_examples: Where is the pain and what is it like?
Does anything make the cramping better?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's crampy and comes in waves across my lower tummy, and I'm really bloated. It eases off a little when I manage to pass wind.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Still passing flatus and not vomiting
trigger_question_examples: Have you been sick or vomited at all?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, I'm still passing wind — that's the one thing that helps. And no, I haven't been sick or thrown up.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No blood in the stool and no unintentional weight loss
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any blood in the toilet or on the paper?
Has your weight changed without trying?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I haven't seen any blood, and my weight has been about the same — nothing's dropped off.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Only irregular, sub-therapeutic over-the-counter docusate tried with no effect; no regular prescription medications
trigger_question_examples: Have you tried anything for it so far?
Are you on any regular medications?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've taken some docusate from the chemist now and then but it did nothing. I'm not on any regular medicines.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lives alone and is highly anxious about a serious bowel problem
trigger_question_examples: Who is at home with you?
What is worrying you most about this?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's just me at home, and honestly I've been panicking that there's a blockage or something serious going on.
